login.admin_error_not_admin: This account does not have admin access.

kudos.modal_title: Send appreciation and recognition to your teammates
kudos.content_placeholder: Share your appreciation and recognition for your teammate here!
kudos.content_hint: You can type "@ + name" to mention another colleague
kudos.title_placeholder: Give a badge title to your teammate
kudos.title_hint: E.g.: The one who inspires me
kudos.confirm_cancel: Do you want to cancel the kudos you are composing?

the_le.title: Rules
the_le.section1_title: Kudos Recipients: Hero Badges for Positive Influence
the_le.section1_body: Based on the number of teammates who send you Kudos, you will earn the corresponding Hero Badge, displayed directly next to your profile name
the_le.hero_new_desc: Your journey of spreading kindness begins — the first words of appreciation and recognition have found you.
the_le.hero_rising_desc: Your image is growing in your teammates' hearts through your kindness and dedication.
the_le.hero_super_desc: You have become a trusted and beloved symbol, always ready to support and remembered by many teammates.
the_le.hero_legend_threshold: More than 20 people sent you Kudos
the_le.hero_legend_desc: You have become a legend — someone who has left an unforgettable mark on the team through their heart and actions.
the_le.section2_title: Kudos Senders: Collect all 6 icons and receive a mystery gift
the_le.section2_body1: Each Kudos you send will be posted on the system and receive ❤️ from the Sunner community. Every 5 ❤️ received, you will unlock 1 Secret Box, with a chance to receive one of 6 exclusive SAA icons.
the_le.section2_body2: Sunners who collect all 6 icons will receive a mystery gift from SAA 2025.
the_le.section3_body: The 5 Kudos receiving the most ❤️ across all of Sun* will officially become the Top Kudos and receive a special gift from SAA 2025: Root Further.

kudos.title: Kudos Management
kudos.confirm_delete: Delete this kudos? This cannot be undone.

hashtags.title: Hashtags
hashtags.error_in_use: Hashtag is used in kudos — cannot delete.

settings.title: App Settings
settings.error_invalid_date: Invalid date. Please use ISO format.

home.root_further_body: Sun* Annual Awards 2025 — an event to honor outstanding individuals and teams who have relentlessly strived, innovated, and contributed throughout the year. This is our moment to reflect on the journey, celebrate core values, and inspire the entire Sun* Family.
home.root_further_body_1: Facing the rapidly changing landscape of the AI era and increasingly high demands from clients, Sun* has chosen a strategy of diversifying capabilities — not just striving to be elite in their own field, but reaching for a higher goal where every Sunner becomes a "problem-solver" — an expert in resolving any challenge, finding solutions for every project, client, and societal problem.
home.root_further_body_2: Drawing inspiration from this diversity of capabilities, the flexibility to grow, and the spirit of going deeper to break through in the AI era, "Root Further" has been chosen as the official theme for Sun* Annual Awards 2025.
home.root_further_body_3: Beyond its surface meaning, "Root Further" represents our collective journey of continuously reaching further, planting roots deeper, touching the hidden "geological layers" to continue thriving, growing, and nurturing the passion for creating value that burns within every Sunner. Borrowing the image of roots continually driving deep into the earth, weaving through layers of sediment to absorb the finest nutrients, Sunners are "absorbing" the essence of the era and market challenges to reinvent themselves daily — expanding capabilities and firmly "taking root" in the AI era, a completely new, complex, and unpredictable "geological layer" that also holds boundless potential and opportunity.
home.root_further_quote: A tree with deep roots fears no storm
home.root_further_quote_note: (A tree with deep roots fears no storm — English proverb)
home.root_further_body_4: In the face of storms, only trees with strong enough roots can stand firm. An organization with individuals who trust in their diverse capabilities, ready to innovate and embrace challenges, and take ownership of change — is one that not only stands strong amid turbulence, but also unlocks every advantage and conquers the challenges of the times. More than just a name for a new chapter in the organization's journey, "Root Further" is also a rallying call, encouraging each of us to dare to believe in ourselves, dare to go deeper, unlock every potential, break through every limit, and become the most versatile and outstanding version of ourselves. For in the AI era, diverse capabilities and harnessing the power of the times are the essential prerequisites for enduring.
home.root_further_body_5: No one knows what hidden "geological layers" lie deep within the "earth" of today's technology industry and modern markets. What we do know is that when "Root Further" becomes the spirit of our roots, we will not be fearful — we will feel ever more excited before any uncharted territory on the journey ahead. For we always believe that within those boundless frontiers, countless wonders and opportunities to rise await us.
home.awards_subtitle: Each category recognizes the top outstanding performers who have made exceptional contributions in their respective fields.
home.kudos_body: Peer recognition and appreciation activity — introduced for all Sunners for the first time. Launching in November 2025, it encourages Sun* members to share recognition and appreciation messages to colleagues on the BTC-published platform. These will serve as reference material for the Heads Council when selecting award recipients.
